raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The use of 'switches' to convert semi-automatic handguns into fully automatic machine guns has skyrocketed in recent years.",
    "Guns equipped with 'switches' are quickly becoming a weapon of choice for criminals.",
    "Devices that convert semi-automatic firearms into fully automatic weapons can be made at home with a 3D printer.",
    "These conversion devices can be installed in minutes with only a screwdriver.",
    "Fully automatic machine guns are capable of firing hundreds of rounds per minute.",
    "Some semi-automatic firearms are designed in a way that allows for easy conversion to fully automatic weapons using a 'switch'.",
    "Most handgun designs cannot be modified to become fully automatic using a 'switch'.",
    "Certain manufacturers have refused to adjust their handgun designs to prevent conversion into fully automatic weapons.",
    "Law enforcement agencies across the country have reported an increase in recoveries of parts and weapons equipped with conversion devices.",
    "A tragic shooting near the California State Capitol Building in 2022 involved a modified automatic weapon."
  ]
}
```
